abstracts.abstract:
This Act provides the following support for federal workers during a government shutdown:
(1) In Section 1 of this Act, interest free loans to provide financial assistance.
(2) In Section 2 of this Act, free transportation on public transit.
(3) In Sections 3 through 6 of this Act, deferral of certain State, county, and school tax filings, payments, and collections.

bill.title: AN ACT TO AMEND TITLE 2, TITLE 9, TITLE 19, AND TITLE 30 OF THE DELAWARE CODE RELATING TO SUPPORT FOR FEDERAL WORKERS AFFECTED BY A GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN.

action.description: Reported Out of Committee (Administration) in House with 4 On Its Merits, 1 Unfavorable
